title: CSIR NIScPR Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR)
short_info: National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR NIScPR. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR NIScPR Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences /MVSc. or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicines from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Associate I (MoES) & Project Associate I (DST): Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences /MVSc. or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicines from a recognized University. Desirable: experience in software development and proficiency in Linux, Apache HTTP Server, MySQL, PHP, JavaScript, J-query and knowledge of content management system like Drupal/Joomla. Working knowledge in database design, handling metadata, web enable applications and portal designing.

salary_details.details: Project Associate I (MoES): Rs. 25000/- OR Rs. 31000/- +HRA Project Associate I (DST): Rs. 25000/- OR Rs. 31000/- +HRA

selection_process: Academic records Performance in the test Interview
